body.body: cortex.py lines 1061, 1155, 1191, 2158, 2338 — replace SELECT * with explicit column list excluding embedding in id IN batch fetches that do not use embeddings. Only keep SELECT * where cosine rerank needs the vector. MEDIUM inertia — read each site before editing. See #258.
body.title: Fix SELECT * embedding blob in batch id IN fetches (#258)
body.result: cortex.py: added _MEM_COLS_NO_EMBED constant; replaced SELECT * with explicit 19-column list (excludes embedding blob) at 5 batch id IN fetch sites (lines ~1070, 1164, 1201, 2169, 2349). Syntax OK.
